calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KENNETH UNG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off Calendar. Parties have conditionally settled. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Continued To Aug-26-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Disqualify Harvey W. Stein And Law Offices Of Harvey W. Stein
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Advanced From Mar-25-15 To Feb-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion To Disqualify Harvey W. Stein And Law Offices Of Harvey W. Stein
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. HARVEY W. STEIN, Tel No. (510) 763-6233 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. TONY C. HOH, Tel No. (415) 788-8810 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KENNETH UNG'S Motion To Disqualify Harvey W. Stein And Law Offices Of Harvey W. Stein is denied. It is clear from the record that the Motion could and should have been made concurrently with or shortly after the hearing on the motion to set aside default. No such action was taken, nor did Defendant avail himself of the opportunity to do so until thirteen months after Ung was first served, six months after counsel was retained, six months after Ung's declaration was filed in support of his motion to set aside default, five days before Ung's deposition, and within a few weeks of trial. Stein's connection with the adversary party was revealed in Ung's Declaration filed six months ago in support of his motion to set aside default. Alternatively, the Court finds that no substantial relationship exists to warrant disqualification. Stein did not represent Ung in an individual capacity at his deposition, but only in a representative capacity as an officer of Icebee, and Ung revealed no confidential information to Stein during the Icebee litigation. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Paula J. Shi, CSR #13358 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
